chrome.exe.name: Google Chrome
chrome.exe.description: Web browser. RAM usage increases with open tabs.

msedge.exe.name: Microsoft Edge
msedge.exe.description: Chromium-based browser. Similar RAM behavior to Chrome.

firefox.exe.name: Mozilla Firefox
firefox.exe.description: Open-source web browser. Generally lighter than Chrome.

opera.exe.name: Opera Browser
opera.exe.description: Chromium-based with built-in VPN and ad blocker.

brave.exe.name: Brave Browser
brave.exe.description: Privacy-focused Chromium browser with ad blocking.

python.exe.name: Python Interpreter
python.exe.description: Runs Python scripts. Usage depends on script complexity.

pythonw.exe.name: Python (No Console)
pythonw.exe.description: Python without console window. Used by GUI apps like PC_Workman.

node.exe.name: Node.js Runtime
node.exe.description: JavaScript runtime for server-side apps and dev tools.

code.exe.name: Visual Studio Code
code.exe.description: Popular code editor. Extensions increase resource usage.

discord.exe.name: Discord
discord.exe.description: Voice, video, and text chat platform for communities.

spotify.exe.name: Spotify
spotify.exe.description: Music streaming service. Background playback is lightweight.

steam.exe.name: Steam Client
steam.exe.description: Game distribution platform. Background overlay can impact games.

epicgameslauncher.exe.name: Epic Games Launcher
epicgameslauncher.exe.description: Game launcher and store. Heavy when updating games.

riotclientservices.exe.name: Riot Client
riotclientservices.exe.description: Launcher for League of Legends, Valorant, TFT.

explorer.exe.name: Windows Explorer
explorer.exe.description: Windows shell and file manager. Critical system process.

svchost.exe.name: Service Host
svchost.exe.description: Hosts Windows services. Multiple instances are normal.

system.name: System Process
system.description: Core Windows NT kernel and system threads. Always running.

dwm.exe.name: Desktop Window Manager
dwm.exe.description: Manages visual effects, transparency, and window composition.

taskmgr.exe.name: Task Manager
taskmgr.exe.description: Windows Task Manager for monitoring and managing processes.

csrss.exe.name: Client Server Runtime
csrss.exe.description: Critical Windows subsystem. Handles console windows and threads.

winlogon.exe.name: Windows Logon
winlogon.exe.description: Manages user login/logout and Ctrl+Alt+Del screen.

lsass.exe.name: Local Security Authority
lsass.exe.description: Handles Windows security policy and authentication.

nvcontainer.exe.name: NVIDIA Container
nvcontainer.exe.description: Hosts NVIDIA services like GeForce Experience and telemetry.

nvdisplay.container.exe.name: NVIDIA Display Container
nvdisplay.container.exe.description: Manages NVIDIA Control Panel and display settings.

runtimebroker.exe.name: Runtime Broker
runtimebroker.exe.description: Manages permissions for UWP apps. High RAM = app permission bug.

searchindexer.exe.name: Windows Search Indexer
searchindexer.exe.description: Indexes files for faster search. Heavy during initial indexing.

antimalwareservice.exe.name: Windows Defender
antimalwareservice.exe.description: Windows Defender antivirus. Scans can be CPU-intensive.

git.exe.name: Git Version Control
git.exe.description: Distributed version control system for code repositories.

docker.exe.name: Docker Desktop
docker.exe.description: Container platform. Heavy when running multiple containers.

teams.exe.name: Microsoft Teams
teams.exe.description: Business communication platform. Heavy during video calls.

zoom.exe.name: Zoom Meetings
zoom.exe.description: Video conferencing app. GPU acceleration recommended.

skype.exe.name: Skype
skype.exe.description: Video calls and messaging. Legacy version, being replaced by Teams.

vlc.exe.name: VLC Media Player
vlc.exe.description: Versatile media player. Lightweight and open-source.

obs64.exe.name: OBS Studio
obs64.exe.description: Screen recording and streaming software. GPU encoding recommended.

photoshop.exe.name: Adobe Photoshop
photoshop.exe.description: Professional image editing. RAM usage depends on file size.

illustrator.exe.name: Adobe Illustrator
illustrator.exe.description: Vector graphics editor. GPU acceleration for complex artwork.

excel.exe.name: Microsoft Excel
excel.exe.description: Spreadsheet application. Large files can be CPU-intensive.

winword.exe.name: Microsoft Word
winword.exe.description: Document editor. Generally lightweight unless heavy formatting.

powerpnt.exe.name: Microsoft PowerPoint
powerpnt.exe.description: Presentation software. Videos and animations increase usage.

outlook.exe.name: Microsoft Outlook
outlook.exe.description: Email and calendar client. Syncing large mailboxes is heavy.

valorant.exe.name: Valorant
valorant.exe.description: Competitive tactical shooter. CPU-heavy for high FPS.

league of legends.exe.name: League of Legends
league of legends.exe.description: MOBA game. Moderate requirements, optimized for older hardware.

csgo.exe.name: Counter-Strike: GO
csgo.exe.description: Competitive FPS. CPU-bound for high frame rates.

fortnite.exe.name: Fortnite
fortnite.exe.description: Battle royale game. DX12 mode recommended for newer GPUs.

gta5.exe.name: Grand Theft Auto V
gta5.exe.description: Open-world game. GPU-heavy with high settings.

minecraft.exe.name: Minecraft Java Edition
minecraft.exe.description: Sandbox game. Single-threaded, benefits from high CPU clock.

javaw.exe.name: Java Runtime
javaw.exe.description: Runs Java applications. Used by Minecraft and development tools.

wininit.exe.name: Windows Initialization
wininit.exe.description: Starts critical Windows services during boot.

services.exe.name: Services Control Manager
services.exe.description: Manages Windows services. Critical system process.

spoolsv.exe.name: Print Spooler
spoolsv.exe.description: Manages print jobs. Can be disabled if no printer used.

audiodg.exe.name: Windows Audio Device Graph
audiodg.exe.description: Processes audio streams and effects. Isolated for stability.

conhost.exe.name: Console Window Host
conhost.exe.description: Hosts console (cmd.exe) windows. One per console instance.

cmd.exe.name: Command Prompt
cmd.exe.description: Windows command-line interpreter. Used for scripts and admin tasks.

powershell.exe.name: Windows PowerShell
powershell.exe.description: Advanced scripting shell for automation and admin tasks.

calculator.exe.name: Calculator
calculator.exe.description: Windows calculator app. Minimal resource usage.

msiexec.exe.name: Windows Installer
msiexec.exe.description: Installs, maintains, and removes software (.msi packages).

trustedinstaller.exe.name: Windows Modules Installer
trustedinstaller.exe.description: Installs Windows updates. High CPU during update installation.

vmmem.name: WSL 2 Virtual Machine
vmmem.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux 2 memory process.

wsl.exe.name: Windows Subsystem for Linux
wsl.exe.description: Runs Linux distributions on Windows. Popular for development.

windowsterminal.exe.name: Windows Terminal
windowsterminal.exe.description: Modern terminal for cmd, PowerShell, and WSL. GPU-accelerated.

malwarebytes.exe.name: Malwarebytes
malwarebytes.exe.description: Anti-malware protection. Scans can be CPU-intensive.

ccleaner.exe.name: CCleaner
ccleaner.exe.description: System cleaner and optimizer. Use with caution on registry.

torrent.exe.name: BitTorrent Client
torrent.exe.description: P2P file sharing. Can saturate bandwidth and slow network.

utorrent.exe.name: uTorrent
utorrent.exe.description: Lightweight torrent client. Limit upload/download for performance.

winrar.exe.name: WinRAR
winrar.exe.description: Archive extraction and compression tool. CPU-heavy during compression.

7zfm.exe.name: 7-Zip File Manager
7zfm.exe.description: Open-source file archiver. Faster compression than WinRAR.

everything.exe.name: Everything Search
everything.exe.description: Instant file search. Much faster than Windows search.

anydesk.exe.name: AnyDesk
anydesk.exe.description: Remote desktop software. Lightweight and fast.

teamviewer.exe.name: TeamViewer
teamviewer.exe.description: Remote support and access. Heavier than AnyDesk.

bluestacks.exe.name: BlueStacks
bluestacks.exe.description: Android emulator for PC. Very resource-intensive.

memu.exe.name: MEmu Play
memu.exe.description: Android emulator optimized for gaming. Heavy RAM usage.

vmware.exe.name: VMware Workstation
vmware.exe.description: Virtual machine software. Resource usage depends on VM settings.

virtualbox.exe.name: Oracle VM VirtualBox
virtualbox.exe.description: Free virtualization software. Similar resource needs to VMware.

claude.exe.name: Claude Desktop
claude.exe.description: Anthropic's Claude AI assistant desktop app. Electron-based, GPU-accelerated inference.

datatransfer.exe.name: Data Transfer Host
datatransfer.exe.description: Part of Windows Connected Devices Platform. Handles data sync between devices.

wmiprvse.exe.name: WMI Provider Host
wmiprvse.exe.description: Windows Management Instrumentation host. Feeds hardware data to monitoring tools.

msmpeng.exe.name: Windows Defender Engine
msmpeng.exe.description: Core antivirus engine for Windows Defender. CPU spikes during background scans.

registry.name: Windows Registry Process
registry.description: NT kernel process managing the Windows registry hive in memory. Always present.

hitman2.exe.name: HITMAN 2
hitman2.exe.description: Stealth action game. GPU-heavy with high detail; benefits from fast SSD streaming.

hitman3.exe.name: HITMAN World of Assassination
hitman3.exe.description: Stealth sandbox game (HITMAN 3 / WoA). Ray-tracing support; VRAM-hungry at 4K.

hitman.exe.name: HITMAN (2016)
hitman.exe.description: Reboot of the Hitman franchise. CPU-intensive AI and crowd simulation.

wermgr.exe.name: Windows Error Reporting
wermgr.exe.description: Collects and sends crash reports to Microsoft. Spikes after app crashes.

sihost.exe.name: Shell Infrastructure Host
sihost.exe.description: Handles shell-related UI including Action Center and taskbar notifications.

fontdrvhost.exe.name: Font Driver Host
fontdrvhost.exe.description: Isolated host process for font rendering. Sandboxed for security.

smss.exe.name: Session Manager Subsystem
smss.exe.description: First user-mode process started by NT kernel. Manages Windows sessions.

dllhost.exe.name: COM Surrogate
dllhost.exe.description: Hosts COM objects (e.g. thumbnail generators). Multiple instances are normal.

taskhostw.exe.name: Task Host for Windows
taskhostw.exe.description: Runs scheduled tasks and DLL-based services. Brief CPU spikes are normal.

telegram.exe.name: Telegram Desktop
telegram.exe.description: Messaging app with cloud sync. Lightweight compared to Electron apps.

whatsapp.exe.name: WhatsApp Desktop
whatsapp.exe.description: Desktop client for WhatsApp messaging. Electron-based.

notepad++.exe.name: Notepad++
notepad++.exe.description: Lightweight code/text editor with syntax highlighting and plugins.

java.exe.name: Java Runtime (Console)
java.exe.description: Runs Java apps with console output. Usage depends on application.

onedrive.exe.name: Microsoft OneDrive
onedrive.exe.description: Cloud storage sync client. CPU spikes during file uploads and indexing.

dropbox.exe.name: Dropbox
dropbox.exe.description: Cloud storage sync. Background indexing can slow down older drives.

avp.exe.name: Kaspersky Antivirus
avp.exe.description: Kaspersky endpoint protection process. Scans can be CPU-heavy.

avgui.exe.name: AVG Antivirus UI
avgui.exe.description: AVG Antivirus user interface. Background guard is lightweight.

mbam.exe.name: Malwarebytes Service
mbam.exe.description: Malwarebytes background protection service. Complements antivirus.

xmrig.exe.name: XMRig Miner
xmrig.exe.description: Monero cryptocurrency miner. Should NOT be running unless deliberately installed. Flag as suspicious.

cpuminer.exe.name: CPU Miner
cpuminer.exe.description: Generic cryptocurrency miner. Unauthorized presence = malware.

ethminer.exe.name: Ethereum Miner
ethminer.exe.description: Ethereum/ETC GPU miner. Unauthorized presence = malware.

nicehash.exe.name: NiceHash Miner
nicehash.exe.description: Crypto mining marketplace client. Legitimate if user-installed; suspicious otherwise.
